validationTracks.name: Pre-Veterinary Readiness
validationTracks.description: Core competencies required for competitive veterinary school applications — aligned with AAVMC prerequisite standards

sections.name: Biological Sciences Foundation
sections.description: Biology, microbiology, anatomy, and physiology — foundational life sciences for veterinary medicine

sections.name: Animal Systems Knowledge
sections.description: Genetics, nutrition, production systems, and disease management across domestic species

sections.name: Research & Clinical Preparation
sections.description: Independent research, capstone project, and professional experience demonstrating readiness for graduate-level study

sections.name: Professional Communication & Identity
sections.description: Medical terminology, public speaking, and career planning competencies for veterinary school applications
